reason: Research completed with valid findings. SD-DASHBOARD-AUDIT-001.md has been correctly updated in PRD v0.5.0: case_reference column removed in favor of using cases.id directly. Research confirmed: 1) No case_reference column exists in database, 2) Frontend incorrectly uses task_id (UUID) instead of case_id (integer), 3) Timeline requires per-step background_tasks rows from Prefect orchestrator. Findings documented in .claude/attractor/pipelines/evidence/PRD-DASHBOARD-AUDIT-001-impl-research/research_backend_sd.md
